MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Jennifer Hu.
Attorney Daniel Chung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shao Yu Zhong is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of AUG-19-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
